title: Claude Cowork
voiceScript: There's a Claude mode most people haven't tried. It works on your actual files, not just in chat. Knowledge work piles up. Messy folders, half-built decks, reports pulled every week. So I tested Cowork. Type a goal in plain English, it plans the steps and executes inside a sandboxed folder you choose. A cleanup that took me an hour, it handled in minutes. One sentence to start. Three cadences: daily, weekly, or monthly. Six steps total. Your AI shouldn't just answer questions. It should do the work. If you're still doing this manually, this is worth a look. Follow for more.

scenes.voiceText: There's a Claude mode most people haven't tried. It works on your actual files, not just in chat.

scenes.voiceText: One sentence to start. Three cadences: daily, weekly, or monthly. Six steps total.
scenes.headline: How simple it actually is

scenes.voiceText: Your AI shouldn't just answer questions. It should do the work.

scenes.cta: Ready to stop doing this manually?

source: Anthropic Claude Cowork tutorial 2026. Cowork is an autonomous desktop agent for non-technical knowledge work inside the Claude Desktop app (Chat/Cowork/Code modes). Sandboxed folder access, Ask-before-acting permission mode, /schedule for recurring tasks, Dispatch for mobile control.
